name: Optimized MCP — programmatic tool calling
summary: Anthropic's code execution with MCP exposes servers as filesystem/API surfaces the model reads selectively instead of loading all tool definitions. An example workflow dropped from ~150,000 to ~2,000 tokens (~98.7% reduction). Programmatic Tool Calling in Claude SDK runs orchestration in a sandbox with compact outputs returned to the model. Tool Search / deferred loading further reduces upfront definitions.
methodology_notes: Primary: Anthropic engineering Nov 2025. Requires code execution tool enabled on Claude API. Example is vendor-reported; independent replication in Phase 2 eval TBD.
implications_for_gax: GAX and programmatic MCP share the same axis: do not load what you do not need. GAX differs by shell-like commands (gax gh.pr.list), cap-per-invoke, and envelope v1 for non-LLM consumers—without requiring a JS sandbox in the model loop.
corrections_to_repo_docs: research/01: anchor 98.7% to anthropic.com primary URL.
